meaning: n.音乐唱片分类目录,音乐唱片分类学(法),录音作品目录
examples: And then there is his growing discography.
Rather than a discography, Songkick offers a "gigography" or time line.
West's discography contains innumerable references and allusions to Jackson.
The unfortunate writers had omitted to double-check his Wikipedia discography, and collectively fell victim to Wiki-hoaxers.
The crowd-sourced album helped spread the popularity of the existing discography while giving fans new music to enjoy.
